message:
feat(cli,output): enhance dependency tree visualization, theming, quiet mode, and search/history improvements

Major enhancements to CLI output and display layer:

- Add Theme support to OutputContext for consistent styling across commands
- Implement quiet mode (--quiet) to suppress non-essential output in dep add/remove
- Enhance dep tree with node_key/parent_key tracking and improved serialization
- Expand graph command with richer mermaid diagram generation, cycle detection
  improvements, and multi-format output support (JSON, DOT, mermaid)
- Improve history command with enhanced diff formatting, summary statistics,
  and better handling of field changes
- Add search filtering improvements with configurable result limits and
  pagination support
- Expand show command with richer issue detail display including dependency
  context and cross-reference information
- Refactor issue_panel component for improved layout and theme-aware rendering
- Add OutputContext helper methods for theme access and mode detection
- Enhance SQLite storage with additional query capabilities for dependency
  graph traversal
- Update sync/history with improved export formatting and metadata handling
- Add sample beads database files for testing and development reference
- Expand e2e test coverage for dep tree mermaid output and global flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
